title: Encode and Decode Strings
output_format: The decoded array of strings. The test framework will encode the array and then decode it.
constraints:
- `0 <= strs.length <= 200`
- `0 <= strs[i].length <= 200`
- `strs[i]` contains any possible characters out of `256` valid ascii characters.
function_signature: function encode(strs: string[]): string; function decode(s: string): string[];
